generated_testcases.title: Voyager 5200 Series — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Normal flow timing validation
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager 5200 Series headset
2. Navigate to Settings → Device → Firmware Update
3. Ensure headset battery is ≥ 50% and Bluetooth signal is strong
4. Initiate a Language Pack update (e.g., switch from English to French)
5. Start a timer when the update progress bar reaches 99%
6. Observe the progress bar and app UI continuously
7. Record the time spent at 99% until completion or failure
8. Note any app ANR, freeze, or 'Update failed' toast messages
generated_testcases.expected: The language update should not stall at 99% for more than 2 minutes. Total update time should be within 1-2 minutes. No ANR or crash should occur.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 5200 Series — Language DFU stuck at 99% — App background during stall
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 5200 Series to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Navigate to Firmware Update and start a Language Pack update
3. When progress reaches 99%, press the Home button to background the app
4. Wait 3 minutes in background
5. Return to the app via the app switcher
6. Observe the progress bar state and any error dialogs
7. Check if the headset is still connected and responsive
generated_testcases.expected: After returning from background, the update should either have completed successfully (progress bar at 100%) or show a clear failure state. The app should not be stuck indefinitely at 99%. The headset should remain connected and functional.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 5200 Series — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Bluetooth disconnect during stall
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 5200 Series to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Start a Language Pack update from Firmware Update screen
3. When progress reaches 99%, manually disconnect the headset via phone Bluetooth settings
4. Wait 30 seconds
5. Reconnect the headset via phone Bluetooth settings
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Firmware Update screen
7. Observe the update status and any recovery prompts
generated_testcases.expected: The app should detect the interrupted update and either resume from a reasonable checkpoint or clearly indicate the update failed and prompt the user to retry. The app should not remain stuck showing 99% indefinitely.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 5200 Series — Language DFU stuck at 99% — App force-kill during stall
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 5200 Series to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Start a Language Pack update
3. When progress reaches 99%, force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recents)
4. Wait 1 minute
5. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and reconnect to the headset
6. Navigate to Firmware Update screen
7. Check the update status and headset language setting
generated_testcases.expected: After force-kill and relaunch, the app should correctly report the update state. If the update completed on the headset, the language should be changed and no stale 99% progress should be shown. If incomplete, the app should offer to retry.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 8200 UC — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Normal flow timing validation
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to Voyager 8200 UC headset
2. Navigate to Settings → Device → Firmware Update
3. Ensure headset battery is ≥ 50% and Bluetooth signal is strong
4. Initiate a Language Pack update (e.g., switch from English to German)
5. Start a timer when the update progress bar reaches 99%
6. Observe the progress bar and app UI continuously
7. Record the time spent at 99% until completion or failure
8. Note any app ANR, freeze, or 'Update failed' toast messages
generated_testcases.expected: The language update should not stall at 99% for more than 2 minutes. Total update time should be within 1-2 minutes. No ANR or crash should occur.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 8200 UC — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Low battery during stall
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 8200 UC to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Start a Language Pack update
3. When progress reaches 99%, allow headset battery to drain to critical level (< 10%)
4. Observe the app behavior — any warning dialogs, progress bar changes
5. If the update completes, verify the language setting
6. If the update fails, verify the headset is still usable and can be re-paired
generated_testcases.expected: The app should show a low battery warning before or during the update. If the battery dies during the stall, the headset should not be bricked. After charging, the headset should reconnect and the app should show the correct update state.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 8200 UC — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Concurrent media playback
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 8200 UC to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Start a Language Pack update
3. When progress reaches 99%, start playing music via a media app (e.g., Spotify, YouTube)
4. Observe audio output — any stuttering, distortion, or silence
5. Observe the update progress — does it eventually complete or remain stuck?
6. After update completes or fails, verify headset audio quality and language setting
generated_testcases.expected: Media playback should not interfere with the DFU process. The update should complete within a reasonable time (not stuck at 99% for >2 min). Audio may pause during critical update phases but should resume normally after completion.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 5200 Series — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Repeated update attempt
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 5200 Series to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Start a Language Pack update and let it get stuck at 99%
3. Wait 5 minutes, then force-kill the app
4. Reopen app, reconnect, navigate to Firmware Update
5. Immediately start the same Language Pack update again
6. Observe if the update proceeds normally or gets stuck again at 99%
7. Repeat steps 2-6 two more times (total 3 attempts)
generated_testcases.expected: The update should eventually complete successfully on one of the attempts. The headset should not enter a permanent stuck state. The language should be correctly applied after a successful update.

generated_testcases.title: Voyager 5200 Series — Language DFU stuck at 99% — Multiple language switch without reboot
steps: 1. Connect Voyager 5200 Series to Poly Studio Mobile app
2. Update language from English to French — let it complete fully
3. Immediately switch language from French to Spanish (start new DFU)
4. Observe if the second update also gets stuck at 99%
5. If stuck, record stall duration
6. After completion (or failure), switch language from Spanish to English
7. Observe the third update behavior
generated_testcases.expected: Each subsequent language update should not exhibit cumulative degradation. The stall at 99% should not worsen with repeated updates. All updates should complete within 1-2 minutes total.
